text.title: OpenAPI Spec Authoring Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-openapi-spec artefact.

step.name: lint-baseline
step.action: Run Spectral against templates/spectral.yaml; record errors + warnings.

step.name: extract-components
step.action: Identify schemas referenced > 1 time; pull into components.schemas; replace inlines with $ref.

step.name: tighten-responses
step.action: Replace freeform `{}` responses with typed schemas; set additionalProperties=false on responses.

step.name: align-security
step.action: Match components.securitySchemes to AUTH spec_id + flows + scopes; cross-link via security_aligned_with_auth_id.
